operating_surface_descriptions.surface_description: Direct MCP surface for humans and integrations.
operating_surface_descriptions.contract_summary: Direct MCP is a first-class product surface above the shared server core.

operating_surface_descriptions.surface_description: Future application-layer adapter above the shared server core.
operating_surface_descriptions.contract_summary: A future app-layer must consume the shared core and must not become a parallel truth layer.
Internal platform operations are first-class but must remain an internal operating surface.
